fields.name: Burn
fields.value: A damage-over-time status: the affected unit loses HP based on its Burn potency each turn, and the count is reduced over time.

fields.name: Bleed
fields.value: A damage-over-time status that triggers when the affected unit acts: it loses HP based on its Bleed potency when it uses a skill, and the count is reduced over time.

fields.name: Tremor
fields.value: A stagger-pressure status that builds up and can be 'burst' by certain skills to lower the target's stagger threshold or deal extra effects.

fields.name: Rupture
fields.value: A status that makes the affected unit take extra damage when it is hit; each triggered hit consumes a Rupture count.

fields.name: Sinking
fields.value: A damage-over-time status: the affected unit loses HP based on its Sinking potency on a recurring trigger, and the count is reduced over time.

fields.name: Poise
fields.value: A stacking offensive buff that increases the unit's attack/coin power; certain skills consume Poise for additional effects.

fields.name: Charge
fields.value: A resource that accumulates on certain Identities and is spent by their skills for bonus effects.

fields.name: Haste
fields.value: A buff that increases a unit's Speed for the turn, letting it act earlier and win more clashes.

footer.text: Project Moon · Limbus Company — summarized facts (verify-at-ingest)
